verification.subject: Verify your email address - CoQuest
verification.title: Welcome to CoQuest!
verification.message: Thank you for signing up for CoQuest. Please verify your email address to activate your account.
verification.or_copy: Or copy this link to your browser:
verification.valid_for: This link is valid for 24 hours.
verification.ignore: If you didn't sign up for CoQuest, please ignore this email.

welcome.subject: Welcome to CoQuest! 🎉
welcome.title: Email Verified!
welcome.message: Your account has been successfully activated. You can now use all features of CoQuest!

password_reset.subject: Password Reset - CoQuest
password_reset.title: Password Reset
password_reset.message: You requested a password reset for your CoQuest account.
password_reset.valid_for: This link is valid for 1 hour.
password_reset.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, please ignore this email.
